rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 28, 2014, line 1: Defendant's Demurrer to Third Amended Complaint: OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff does not merely allege inducement to default as in Franczak, Plaintiff alleges bad faith in Defendant's exercise of discretion regarding forbearance under DOT 12.See Harvey v. Bank of America 2013 WL 632088; Harris v. Wells Fargo 2013 WL1820003. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHELDON FONG VS. EAST WEST BANK

Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than January 31, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
